text:
君の向上心は尽きるという言葉を
知らないようだな！

私としても、そこまでの気概を持つ
教え子に巡り会えて、感無量だ！

では始めるとしよう！
さらなる高みを目指し

Guess you've still got some ambition in the
tank, eh?

I can hardly tell you how much it means to
me to have a pupil with your kind of spirit!

Now let's get started! We've got to train you
for the climb still ahead!
